entradas.original: I confirm two Zanzibar-class ships!
entradas.traduzido: Confirmo duas naves da classe Zanzibar!

entradas.original: Looks like they got away\Nfrom the Federation.
Dammit, we always get left behind.
entradas.traduzido: "Por amor de Deus, nós sempre ficamos para trás."

entradas.original: Hey!
The resources they brought\Nback are the life line for Zeon.
Well, I know, but...
The war isn't going to end here with Odessa.
entradas.traduzido: A guerra não vai acabar aqui com a Odessa.

entradas.original: Enemy units, approaching!
Right! Leave'em to me!
I'm gonna take you all\Nback to space, I swear!
Y-Yes, sir!
Two Federation human-types.\NMinovsky density rising!
entradas.traduzido: Dois seres humanos da Federação Terrestre. \NDensidade Minovsky aumentando!

entradas.original: Even using those humanoid ones\Nto search for defeated troops, huh?
Hey, get your head down!\NYou wanna go blind?!
entradas.traduzido: "Olhe para baixo aí! \NVocê quer ficar cego?!"

entradas.original: Passing defense line one!\NBeginning countdown!
entradas.traduzido: Passando a linha de defesa um! \N Começando a contagem regressiva!

entradas.original: All right! Fall back!
Leave the heavy stuff!\NJust take what you can carry!
entradas.traduzido: Deixe a coisa pesada! \NApenas leve o que você pode carregar!

entradas.original: Was that a...?!
Just a vaporization bomb.\NWhat else would it be?
176 seconds to shock wave!
entradas.traduzido: "176 segundos para a onda de choque!"

entradas.original: You're all right, sir.
Yeah.
You're going to regroup at\NRear Admiral Sakhalin's base?
I'm sure he'll be mad as hell about it.
entradas.traduzido: Estou certa que ele vai ficar furioso.

entradas.original: These idiots are actually trying to\Ntake those things with them?
If everyone's ready, move out!
entradas.traduzido: Se todos estiverem prontos, sigam em frente!

entradas.original: Let the Federation have Odessa and the Earth!
entradas.traduzido: Deixe a Federação ter Odessa e a Terra!

entradas.original: Let'em cling to their\Ndoomed little ball of dirt!
God dammit! Die already!
{\i1}Let go of me! Do you want to get killed?!{\i}
That voice... It can't be!
It can't...!
Can Aina be the pilot of this monster?
entradas.traduzido: "Shiro": "Aina pode ser a piloto desse monstro?"

entradas.original: I've gotta make sure!
Aina! Aina Sakhalin! Do you read me?!
entradas.traduzido: Aina! Aina Sahalin! Você me ouve?

entradas.original: Aina, I know it's you! Answer me!
entradas.traduzido: Aina, eu sei que é você! Responda!

entradas.original: Aina!!!
This is... Anti-personnel weaponry.
Is the pilot not using it\Nbecause it's Aina in there?
Or is it because they're dead?
entradas.traduzido: Ou é porque eles estão mortos?

entradas.original: Aina! Aina Sakhalin, right?!
entradas.traduzido: Aina! Aina Sahalin, certo? ![Aina! Aina Sahalin, certo?!](./)

entradas.original: Don't you remember?! It's me, Shiro Amada!
entradas.traduzido: Não se lembra? Sou eu, Shiro Amada!

entradas.original: If you're alive, then answer me!
entradas.traduzido: Se você está vivo, então responda-me!

entradas.original: It really is! It really is Shiro Amada!
So, you do remember me!\NI'm glad you're okay.
entradas.traduzido: "Você ainda se lembra de mim!" "\N Fico feliz que você esteja bem."

entradas.original: I didn't think I'd ever see you again.
entradas.traduzido: Não pensei que eu iria te ver novamente.

entradas.original: Same here.
{\i1}He was actually worried about me...
Found'em! I've got them!
Really?!
Please don't look. This is secret.
Please, use these.
I'm saved! I can get my suit\Nrunning again with these.
I hope these parts fit yours.
entradas.traduzido: "Espero que essas peças se encaixem nas suas."

entradas.original: These aren't secret, are they?
entradas.traduzido: Estes não são secretos, não são?

entradas.original: Don't worry. You can get them anywhere.
entradas.traduzido: Não se preocupe. Você pode encontrá-los em qualquer lugar.

entradas.original: Well, then, thanks.
We may have been fighting\Neach other up till now,
but unless we work together,\Nwe're not going to survive.
All right! It works!
A Zeon and a Feddie, helping each other.
entradas.traduzido: A Zeon e a Federação Terrestre se ajudando mutuamente.

entradas.original: Things get very strange when you're\Naround, Ensign Shiro Amada.
{\i1}Don't most people act this way?{\i}
But... Never mind. Here I go!
entradas.traduzido: Mas... Não importa. Aqui vou eu!

entradas.original: {\i1}Give it a try!{\i}
I can't maintain equilibrium!
{\i1}Shiro, do you read me?!
{\i1}At this rate, were both\Ngoing to die! Please...!
No! Live or die, we're doing it together!
entradas.traduzido: Viva ou morra, estamos fazendo isso juntos!

entradas.original: You are so...
Besides... There's still hope!
C'mon!!!
Do I have enough propellant?!
Not yet!
That's enough! Save yourself!
{\i1}Not yet!{\i}
{\i1}It's hopeless!
Aina! I love you!
Are we all right...?
Shiro Amada, I...
Shiro!!!
Low pressure front moving\Nin from the north-east.
entradas.traduzido: Baixa pressão da frente avançando\N do nordeste.

entradas.original: Weather conditions worsening.
We've picked up what appears to\Nbe a Federation distress signal.
Verify its coordinates and dispatch a Lugun.
entradas.traduzido: Verifique suas coordenadas e envie um Lugun.

entradas.original: We just lost that distress signal!
entradas.traduzido: Nós acabamos de perder o sinal de alerta!

entradas.original: What?!
We should have an approximate\Nfix on those coordinates.
There's no problem. We'll get her back.
Sir!
Where are you going?
There's no need for me to direct\Nthings with you here.
But, Miss Aina is...!
That was a Federation distress signal.
entradas.traduzido: "Foi um sinal de socorro da Federação."

entradas.original: Which means my Apsaras beat it.
entradas.traduzido: O que significa que meu Apsaras venceu.

entradas.original: Aina...
Is Aina all right...?
Aina!!
{\i1}Miss Aina! Please respond!
{\i1}We picked up a Federation distress signal!
{\i1}Miss Aina, please respond!
{\i1}It's only a matter of time before\Nenemy search parties get to you!
{\i1}Miss Aina, please respond!
{\i1}Forgive me, Norris.\NThis time I have to help him.
God dammit...!
I have to find some shelter from this wind!
entradas.traduzido: Tenho que encontrar algum abrigo desse vento!

entradas.original: Water? But why...?
It's still hot from when\NI maxed the engines before.
{\i1}Captain Norris, we can't take more of this!
Wait for the weather to improve.
{\i1}Miss Aina, I hope you're all right!
It's no use...
I'm so tired...
Zeon!!!
Shiro?
Shiro!
Your hands are frostbitten.\NI wouldn't try using them.
I wish we could heat up some water\Nand warm them up slowly.
entradas.traduzido: "Queria que pudéssemos aquecer um pouco de água \Ne aquece-los lentamente."

entradas.original: I'm sorry. I...
Shiro?
Please come inside the snow cave.
entradas.traduzido: Por favor, entre na caverna de neve.

entradas.original: Don't worry about what\Nhappened before!
I... I hate Zeon!
But ever since that day we met in space...
entradas.traduzido: Mas desde aquele dia em que nos encontramos no espaço...

entradas.original: ...haven't been able to forget about you.
Even though you're Zeon.
entradas.traduzido: Apesar de você ser da Zeon.

entradas.original: Even though you've got a boyfriend.
entradas.traduzido: Apesar de você ter um namorado.

entradas.original: A boyfriend?
I don't have a boyfriend.
And even though you're a Fed, my answer is...
entradas.traduzido: E mesmo que você seja um soldado da Federação, minha resposta é...

entradas.original: Aina...
Enter.
entradas.traduzido: Não há nada a ser traduzido.

entradas.original: We're going to try recovering\NMiss Aina again.
If you'll excuse me.
Your brother?!
So, that's who he is!
Yes. And my brother is wrong.
entradas.traduzido: Sim. E meu irmão está errado.

entradas.original: Aina!
My brother is wrong.
There's something I need help with.
entradas.traduzido: Há algo com que eu preciso de ajuda.

entradas.original: This is a new Federation weapon, right?
entradas.traduzido: Sim, é uma nova arma da Federação.

entradas.original: Are you sure about this?
Well, it's okay as long as you forget\Nthe secret stuff after you're done.
entradas.traduzido: Bem, tudo bem contanto que você esqueça \Nas coisas secretas depois que acabar.

entradas.original: I can't do any delicate work with\Nmy hands the way they are.
Right?
So, you trust a Zeon that much?
I do.
For now at least,
let's just forget about the war, Zeon,\Nthe Federation, and your brother.
All right. Let's forget about them.
All right! All right! Stop!
Okay, do it!
Whew! Even at the lowest setting,\Nthis thing's really powerful!
Using a beam weapon to heat the water...
entradas.traduzido: ...aquecendo a água com uma arma de feixe...

entradas.original: You really get some strange ideas!
My hands are all pins and needles.
Hang in there. That means your\Nblood is starting to flow again.
entradas.traduzido: Agarrem-se a isso. Isso significa que seu \N sangue está começando a fluir novamente.

entradas.original: My feet are going numb.
Say, you want in on the bath here?
The Lugun's slower, so send it out first!
entradas.traduzido: O Lugun é mais lento, então enviem primeiro ele!

entradas.original: Hurry up on refueling the Dopp!
Captain Norris!
Odessa has... It's fallen, sir.
Recover our soldiers on the northern line.
entradas.traduzido: Recupere nossos soldados na linha norte.

entradas.original: Tighten security around the base.
entradas.traduzido: Intensifique a segurança ao redor da base.

entradas.original: Sir!
The map of power on Earth\Nis redrawn yet again...
You can look now.
My heart is beating so fast!
entradas.traduzido: Meu coração está batendo tão rápido!

entradas.original: So is mine.
You're pretty, Aina.
{\fad(0,817)}Like a living doll.
Big Brother!
{\i1}Aina, become my arms. Become my legs...{\i}
Aina? Aina... Aina!
Shiro!
I'm not just a doll for Ginius to play with!
entradas.traduzido: Não sou apenas uma boneca para Ginias brincar!

entradas.original: I come this far only to run\Ninto Federation forces now?!
I wish we could just be the last\Nman and woman in the world...
Some day... We'll meet again.
entradas.traduzido: Algum dia... Nós nos encontraremos novamente.

entradas.original: Why?
There's no reason to fight!
{\i1}I have sighted enemy prototype!{\i}
This is the war we're fighting...
entradas.traduzido: Isto é a guerra que estamos lutando...

entradas.original: Stop it!!!
Are you trying to kill yourself?!
Aina, tell me!
If this is war, is there\Nno hope at all for us?!
Hurry up and rescue Miss Aina!
entradas.traduzido: Apressem-se e resgatem a senhorita Aina!

entradas.original: The Federation still has\Nanother plane in the area!
entradas.traduzido: A Federação ainda tem \Noutro avião na área!

entradas.original: What about the Federation pilot?
entradas.traduzido: O que aconteceu ao piloto da Federação?

entradas.original: Eliminated.
Was the Aina I saw in the\Nblizzard just an illusion?
entradas.traduzido: "A Aina que eu vi no \Nblizzard foi apenas uma ilusão?"

entradas.original: After I get back home alive...
entradas.traduzido: Depois que eu voltar vivo para casa...

entradas.original: ...I find a tough military\Ntribunal waiting for me.
And while that's going on,\NKiki's village is attacked by the enemy!
But while I'm under suspicion of being a spy\NI've been placed under house arrest!
entradas.traduzido: Mas enquanto sou suspeito de ser um espião \N eu fui colocado em prisão domiciliar!

entradas.original: Why won't the Federation do something?!
entradas.traduzido: Por que a Federação não faz nada?

entradas.original: If I don't save them...
They may be guerillas,\Nbut they're also my friends!
Next time, on Mobile Suit Gundam\NThe 08th MS Team
Duty and Ideals.
{\fad(475,0)\blur1.5\i0\pos(985,327)\c&H181FA9&}MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM{\i1}
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}You see the dream shining within the storm.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}You see the dream shining within the storm.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Hang on to it now! Don't let it go.
entradas.traduzido: {\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Agora aguentem firme! Não deixe ir embora.

entradas.original: {\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Hang on to it now! Don't let it go.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}All I want is to take those wings on your back...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}All I want is to take those wings on your back...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Those wounded angel wings, and gently...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Those wounded angel wings, and gently...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...pull them close to me.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...pull them close to me.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Newborn in a corner of the endless blue sky...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Newborn in a corner of the endless blue sky...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The dream is there, and even though it may now be small...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The dream is there, and even though it may now be small...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}No matter how strong they may blow...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}No matter how strong they may blow...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...or how icy they may be...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...or how icy they may be...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...those winds can never erase the dream that shines. Oh, no!
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...those winds can never erase the dream that shines. Oh, no!
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The dream that shines inside your heart!
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The dream that shines inside your heart!
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}You see the dream shining within the storm.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}You see the dream shining within the storm.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Hang on to it now! Don't let it go.
entradas.traduzido: {\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Agora aguentem firme! Não deixe ir embora.

entradas.original: {\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Hang on to it now! Don't let it go.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}All I want is to take those wings on your back...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}All I want is to take those wings on your back...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Those wounded angel wings, and gently...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Those wounded angel wings, and gently...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...pull them close to me.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...pull them close to me.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}All that time that's passed me by.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}All that time that's passed me by.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}From childhood till now, so many days.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}From childhood till now, so many days.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}When I look back, I see so many things...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}When I look back, I see so many things...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...that happened to come into my life.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...that happened to come into my life.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The times I cried, the times I laughed.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The times I cried, the times I laughed.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The times I fought, the times I dreamed.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The times I fought, the times I dreamed.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The lost loves that were sort of hard.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The lost loves that were sort of hard.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}All shining in my history.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}All shining in my history.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The ones who caused me pain...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The ones who caused me pain...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...I met and left along the way.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...I met and left along the way.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}But I still ended up meeting you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}But I still ended up meeting you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}The one that I love.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}The one that I love.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}10 years after, a decade from now.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}10 years after, a decade from now.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}I wonder what I will be doing then.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}I wonder what I will be doing then.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}I wonder how I will be still loving you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}I wonder how I will be still loving you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}10 years after, a decade from now.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}10 years after, a decade from now.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}I still want to be looking at you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}I still want to be looking at you.
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}Stay together. When that day comes...
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}Stay together. When that day comes...
{\fad(100,100)\blur2\c&HE8E8E8&\1a&HFF&}...I want to be at your side with a smile.
{\fad(100,100)\blur1\bord0}...I want to be at your side with a smile.
{\pos(720,650)\blur1\c&HDEDEE3&}REUNION
{\pos(720,650)\blur1\c&HDEDEE3&}DUTY AND IDEALS
{\fs200\blur1\pos(720,650)\c&HDEDEE3&}NEXT EPISODE
